title: Capital and revenue income and expenditure
summary: 9706 — capital vs revenue distinction for correct profit measurement.
learningObjectives: Explain effect on statement of profit or loss and SOFP.

simpleExplanation.title: One-off vs ongoing
simpleExplanation.summary: Capital spending buys long-term assets; revenue spending maintains day-to-day operations — only revenue items affect profit in the year.
steps: Capital receipts — reduce asset cost or add liability.
